scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @cashmind/api" "npm run dev -w @cashmind/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cashmind/shared && npm run build -w @cashmind/api && npm run build -w @cashmind/web
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w @cashmind/api && npm run typecheck -w @cashmind/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @cashmind/shared && npm run test -w @cashmind/api
